The Comments source guard fails if route permissions or busy state regress to permission-hydration gating, and the rendered Comments smoke verifies denied permission overrides, policy persistence, captcha/report/block flows, official replies, reply reparenting, delivery activity/retry, author blocklist cleanup, layout checks, and cleanup. `npm run typecheck --workspace @backy-cms/admin`, `BACKY_COMMENTS_SOURCE_ONLY=1 npm run test:comments --workspace @backy-cms/admin`, `BACKY_ADMIN_BASE_URL=http://127.0.0.1:5173 BACKY_PUBLIC_API_BASE_URL=http://127.0.0.1:3001 npm run test:comments --workspace @backy-cms/admin`, and `npm run doctor:release-certification` passed on 2026-05-25.
- **Comments command-center UX update**: `/comments` now keeps the daily moderation command center calmer by leaving readiness, workflow status, manifest/export, CSV export, and refresh controls visible while moving the lower-frequency control map and connected page/blog/user/settings workflow shortcuts into default-collapsed progressive disclosure. The source guard fails if those maps stop being collapsed or lose their target DOM hooks, and the rendered Comments smoke verifies the collapsed state, map availability, no horizontal overflow, permission denials, policy persistence, captcha/report/block flows, official replies, reply reparenting, delivery activity/retry, author blocklist cleanup, and cleanup. `BACKY_COMMENTS_SOURCE_ONLY=1 npm run test:comments --workspace @backy-cms/admin`, `npm run typecheck --workspace @backy-cms/admin`, `BACKY_COMMENTS_CDP_PORT=9481 BACKY_ADMIN_BASE_URL=http://127.0.0.1:5173 BACKY_PUBLIC_API_BASE_URL=http://127.0.0.1:3001 npm run test:comments --workspace @backy-cms/admin`, and `npm run doctor:release-certification` passed on 2026-05-25. In-app Browser validation was attempted but the Browser runtime reported `iab` unavailable, so the repo CDP smoke was used as the rendered fallback.
- **Comments policy busy-scope update**: `/comments` now scopes comment-policy saves to `isCommentPolicyBusy`/`isCommentPolicyDisabled` instead of folding `isSavingPolicy` into the whole comments workspace. Saving policy disables the policy draft controls and shows `Saving...`, while moderation filters, queue actions, connected workflow links, analytics/API copy controls, manifest/CSV export, blocklist/audit controls, and refresh affordances no longer look dead solely because policy persistence is in flight. The Comments source guard fails if `isSavingPolicy` is folded back into `isCommentsBusy` or if policy controls stop using the scoped disabled state. `BACKY_COMMENTS_SOURCE_ONLY=1 npm run test:comments --workspace @backy-cms/admin`, `npm run typecheck --workspace @backy-cms/admin`, `BACKY_COMMENTS_CDP_PORT=9525 BACKY_ADMIN_BASE_URL=http://127.0.0.1:5173 BACKY_PUBLIC_API_BASE_URL=http://127.0.0.1:3001 npm run test:comments --workspace @backy-cms/admin`, and `npm run doctor:release-certification` passed on 2026-05-25. In-app Browser validation was attempted but the Browser runtime reported `iab` unavailable, so the repo CDP smoke was used as rendered fallback.
- **Blog create route-check responsiveness update**: `/blog/new` now treats existing-blog-route verification as a visible blocker/readiness state instead of allowing save before the check settles or making preview feel dead during background verification. Save draft and preview hard-disables only for real create/preview mutations or missing edit/publish permission, while both draft creation paths require the route check to finish and expose their current blocker through stable preview metadata for the smoke. The blog-create source guard now fails if route checks fall out of draft/preview validation, if permission hydration is reintroduced into create busy state, or if preview actions are tied back to full form validity. `npm run typecheck --workspace @backy-cms/admin`, `BACKY_BLOG_CREATE_SOURCE_ONLY=1 npm run test:blog-create --workspace @backy-cms/admin`, `BACKY_ADMIN_BASE_URL=http://127.0.0.1:5173 BACKY_PUBLIC_API_BASE_URL=http://127.0.0.1:3001 npm run test:blog-create --workspace @backy-cms/admin`, and `npm run doctor:release-certification` passed on 2026-05-25.
- **Blog create submit-state observability update**: `/blog/new` now mirrors the stronger `/pages/new` create-control contract with visible `blog-create-submit-blocker` copy plus machine-readable submit/preview `data-state`, `data-blocker`, `data-can-submit`, and `data-can-preview` attributes across the command center, focused canvas action bar, and publish panel. The rendered blog-create smoke intentionally clears title/slug, verifies `data-state="blocked"`, `data-can-submit="false"`, and the visible "Save is blocked" message, then refills the post and continues through focused canvas, responsive breakpoint editing, autosave/recovery, media picker, preview creation, and persisted custom frontend design metadata. `npm run typecheck --workspace @backy-cms/admin`, `BACKY_BLOG_CREATE_SOURCE_ONLY=1 npm run test:blog-create --workspace @backy-cms/admin`, and `BACKY_ADMIN_BASE_URL=http://127.0.0.1:5173 BACKY_PUBLIC_API_BASE_URL=http://127.0.0.1:3001 npm run test:blog-create --workspace @backy-cms/admin` passed on 2026-05-25.
- **Pages/Blog primary create-link verification update**: the Pages and Blog list smokes now click the daily command-center create links instead of only source-checking them. `/pages` rendered smoke clicks `pages-command-create`, verifies it opens `/pages/new?siteId=site-cook` with the blank template selected, active target site preserved, and create controls present while route checking is visible. `/blog` rendered smoke clicks `blog-command-create`, verifies it opens `/blog/new?siteId=site-demo`, preserves the active target site, and shows the create workspace with visible "Save is blocked" guidance for the empty title/slug state before returning to the list workflow. Source guards now fail if those rendered click-through checks are removed, closing the prior "New Page/New post exists but might not open" gap. `BACKY_PAGES_LIST_SOURCE_ONLY=1 npm run test:pages-list --workspace @backy-cms/admin`, `BACKY_BLOG_LIST_SOURCE_ONLY=1 npm run test:blog-list --workspace @backy-cms/admin`, `BACKY_ADMIN_BASE_URL=http://127.0.0.1:5173 BACKY_PUBLIC_API_BASE_URL=http://127.0.0.1:3001 BACKY_CDP_PORT=9523 npm run test:pages-list --workspace @backy-cms/admin`, and `BACKY_ADMIN_BASE_URL=http://127.0.0.1:5173 BACKY_PUBLIC_API_BASE_URL=http://127.0.0.1:3001 BACKY_BLOG_LIST_CDP_PORT=9524 npm run test:blog-list --workspace @backy-cms/admin` passed on 2026-05-25. In-app Browser validation was attempted but the Browser runtime reported `iab` unavailable, so the repo CDP smokes were used as the rendered fallback.
- **Editor text interaction history hygiene update**: the canvas now compares drag/resize snapshots before committing pointer-up transforms, so ordinary text-layer clicks no longer create no-op history or autosave work. Rich text edit activation also records the normalized editor-ready document as a baseline, so double-clicking into a heading opens inline editing without marking the page dirty before content changes. The component-library rendered smoke now asserts single-click selection stays read-only, double-click editing activates, geometry is unchanged, and `saveState="saved"`/`pendingChanges=0` survives both interactions. `BACKY_EDITOR_SOURCE_ONLY=1 npm run test:editor-drag --workspace @backy-cms/admin`, `npm run test:editor-smoke-coverage --workspace @backy-cms/admin`, `npm run typecheck --workspace @backy-cms/admin`, and `BACKY_CDP_PORT=9508 BACKY_ADMIN_BASE_URL=http://127.0.0.1:5173 BACKY_PUBLIC_API_BASE_URL=http://127.0.0.1:3001 npm run test:editor-library --workspace @backy-cms/admin` passed on 2026-05-25.
- **Editor focus-mode context controls update**: the in-canvas context bar no longer turns Components, Layers, and Inspector into disabled controls while wide canvas focus is active. Clicking those visible context buttons now exits focus mode and opens the requested panel, matching the existing `B`/`L`/`I` keyboard shortcut behavior, and the buttons expose `data-exits-focus-mode` so custom editor clients and smoke tests can distinguish focus-exit actions from normal panel toggles. The editor source guard fails if `disabled={isCanvasFocusMode}` returns to those controls, and the shortcut rendered smoke now enters focus mode, clicks the context Components/Layers/Inspector buttons, and verifies each path restores the right side panel without losing the existing keyboard shortcut coverage. `BACKY_EDITOR_SOURCE_ONLY=1 npm run test:editor-drag --workspace @backy-cms/admin`, `npm run test:editor-smoke-coverage --workspace @backy-cms/admin`, `npm run typecheck --workspace @backy-cms/admin`, and `BACKY_CDP_PORT=9509 BACKY_ADMIN_BASE_URL=http://127.0.0.1:5173 BACKY_PUBLIC_API_BASE_URL=http://127.0.0.1:3001 npm run test:editor-shortcuts --workspace @backy-cms/admin` passed on 2026-05-25. In-app Browser validation was attempted but the Browser runtime reported `iab` unavailable, so the repo CDP smoke was used as the rendered fallback.
- **Editor inspector no-selection recovery update**: the right inspector no longer ends in a passive "No selection" state. When no layer is selected it now shows visible/total layer counts, Select first, Layers, and quick-add controls for Heading, Text, and Section, all backed by the existing selection/layer-tree/component insertion handlers. The source guard fails if those empty-state hooks disappear, and the shortcut rendered smoke verifies Select first chooses a visible layer, Escape returns to the actionable empty inspector, the Layers action opens the layer tree, and Text quick-add creates one new selected editable text layer with dirty save-state metadata before returning to the empty inspector flow. `BACKY_EDITOR_SOURCE_ONLY=1 npm run test:editor-drag --workspace @backy-cms/admin`, `npm run test:editor-smoke-coverage --workspace @backy-cms/admin`, `npm run typecheck --workspace @backy-cms/admin`, and `BACKY_CDP_PORT=9511 BACKY_ADMIN_BASE_URL=http://127.0.0.1:5173 BACKY_PUBLIC_API_BASE_URL=http://127.0.0.1:3001 npm run test:editor-shortcuts --workspace @backy-cms/admin` passed on 2026-05-25. In-app Browser validation was attempted but the Browser runtime reported `iab` unavailable, so the repo CDP smoke was used as the rendered fallback.
- **Editor Layers no-match recovery update**: the Layers panel no longer leaves operators in a passive zero-row filter state. Search or scope filters that hide every row now show the active query/scope, expose `Show all layers`, and provide a header reset action that clears search, returns the scope to All, removes the active-filter badge, and restores layer rows without disturbing collapsed parent state. The editor source guard fails if the actionable filter-empty hooks disappear, and the rendered Layers smoke verifies `zz-layer-no-match` produces `editor-layer-filter-empty`, resets through `editor-layer-empty-reset-filters`, clears the input, returns `data-layer-scope="all"`, and restores visible rows before continuing through selection, rename, reorder, visibility, lock, duplicate/delete, manual save, and persisted layer-state coverage. `BACKY_EDITOR_SOURCE_ONLY=1 npm run test:editor-drag --workspace @backy-cms/admin`, `node --check apps/admin/scripts/editor-drag-smoke.mjs`, `npm run typecheck --workspace @backy-cms/admin`, and `BACKY_CDP_PORT=9555 BACKY_ADMIN_BASE_URL=http://127.0.0.1:5173 BACKY_PUBLIC_API_BASE_URL=http://127.0.0.1:3001 npm run test:editor-layers --workspace @backy-cms/admin` passed on 2026-05-26. In-app Browser validation was attempted but the Browser runtime reported `iab` unavailable, so the repo CDP smoke was used as the rendered fallback.
- **Editor component-library Recent lane update**: the page editor component library now persists the last six inserted or dragged components in a dedicated Recent category, keeping repeated Wix-like authoring actions reachable without rescanning All, Essentials, or search. Recent insertions use `backy.editor.componentLibrary.recent`, expose count/limit/key metadata through the library summary, and share the same Add/drag insertion path as normal catalog items so defaults, responsive metadata, selection, and autosave behavior remain unchanged. Recent now renders from persisted recent keys in last-used order and recomputes while the Recent tab is open, so adding another visible Recent item immediately moves it to the top instead of leaving the shelf in catalog or stale memo order. The editor source guard fails if Recent falls back to catalog filtering, and the rendered component-library smoke verifies a fresh library starts with no recent items, Add Divider persists `divider`, Add Image reorders stored and summary keys to `image,divider`, opening Recent renders `image,divider`, then adding Divider from the open Recent tab reorders the visible list and summary keys to `divider,image` before autosave settles. `BACKY_EDITOR_SOURCE_ONLY=1 npm run test:editor-drag --workspace @backy-cms/admin`, `node --check apps/admin/scripts/editor-drag-smoke.mjs`, `npm run typecheck --workspace @backy-cms/admin`, and `BACKY_CDP_PORT=9553 BACKY_ADMIN_BASE_URL=http://127.0.0.1:5173 BACKY_PUBLIC_API_BASE_URL=http://127.0.0.1:3001 npm run test:editor-library --workspace @backy-cms/admin` passed on 2026-05-25. In-app Browser validation was attempted but the Browser runtime reported `iab` unavailable, so the repo CDP smoke was used as the rendered fallback.
- **Editor component-library no-match recovery update**: the page editor component library no longer leaves category/search misses as passive empty cards. Empty Favorites/Recent/Saved/search states now expose `editor-component-filter-empty`, show the active category/query, provide header Reset plus `Show all components`, clear search, switch back to All, and restore catalog rows. The editor source guard fails if the reset hooks or filter-active metadata disappear, and the rendered component-library smoke verifies Favorites plus `zz-no-component` produces zero rows, then `editor-component-empty-reset-filters` clears the query, returns `data-component-library-category="all"`, clears `data-component-library-filter-active`, removes the empty state, and restores Divider/Image before continuing through preview/favorite/recent/autosave coverage. `BACKY_EDITOR_SOURCE_ONLY=1 npm run test:editor-drag --workspace @backy-cms/admin`, `node --check apps/admin/scripts/editor-drag-smoke.mjs`, `npm run typecheck --workspace @backy-cms/admin`, and `BACKY_CDP_PORT=9556 BACKY_ADMIN_BASE_URL=http://127.0.0.1:5173 BACKY_PUBLIC_API_BASE_URL=http://127.0.0.1:3001 npm run test:editor-library --workspace @backy-cms/admin` passed on 2026-05-26. In-app Browser validation was attempted but the Browser runtime reported `iab` unavailable, so the repo CDP smoke was used as the rendered fallback.
- **Editor media-picker no-match recovery update**: the shared editor media picker no longer only tells operators to clear filters without providing a control. Library search/type/scope/folder filters now expose `data-library-filter-active`, `data-library-search-query`, and `data-library-type-filter` metadata plus header `media-library-clear-filters` and empty-state `media-library-empty-clear-filters` controls. The source guard fails if the filter-active metadata or clear-filter controls disappear, and the rendered media-upload smoke verifies an uploaded page-scoped image hidden by `zz-no-media` plus a folder filter shows the empty Clear filters action, then resets search, type, folder, nested-folder state, removes the empty state/header reset, restores the uploaded image row, selects it, saves, and confirms persisted media organization/design metadata. `BACKY_EDITOR_SOURCE_ONLY=1 npm run test:editor-drag --workspace @backy-cms/admin`, `node --check apps/admin/scripts/editor-drag-smoke.mjs`, `npm run typecheck --workspace @backy-cms/admin`, and `BACKY_CDP_PORT=9558 BACKY_ADMIN_BASE_URL=http://127.0.0.1:5173 BACKY_PUBLIC_API_BASE_URL=http://127.0.0.1:3001 npm run test:editor-media-upload --workspace @backy-cms/admin` passed on 2026-05-26. In-app Browser validation was attempted but the Browser runtime reported `iab` unavailable, so the repo CDP smoke was used as the rendered fallback.
- **Site frontend-design hydration/reachability update**: `/sites/$siteId` now retries frontend-design contract hydration after admin/session permission state becomes available, instead of leaving the design contract panel stuck on the unconfigured draft when the first load races auth. The site frontend-design editor now tracks `hydrated` and `dirty` draft state, keeps draft controls editable after hydration during background refreshes, preserves unsaved local edits if a refresh response returns late, and exposes `data-hydrated`, `data-dirty`, and `data-draft-disabled` hooks plus a background-refresh notice. Site detail and Sites source guards fail if the panel regresses to hard-disabling draft controls on `frontendDesignState.loading`, and the rendered Site Detail smoke verifies the hydrated draft controls before saving a full page/blog/form/product/collection/section template registry. `BACKY_SITE_DETAIL_SOURCE_ONLY=1 npm run test:site-detail --workspace @backy-cms/admin`, `BACKY_SITES_SOURCE_ONLY=1 npm run test:sites --workspace @backy-cms/admin`, `npm run typecheck --workspace @backy-cms/admin`, and `BACKY_SITE_DETAIL_CDP_PORT=9512 BACKY_ADMIN_BASE_URL=http://127.0.0.1:5173 BACKY_PUBLIC_API_BASE_URL=http://127.0.0.1:3001 npm run test:site-detail --workspace @backy-cms/admin` passed on 2026-05-25.
- **Site navigation hydration/reachability update**: `/sites/$siteId` now retries navigation editor hydration after admin/session permission state becomes available, tracks `hydrated` and `dirty` navigation drafts, and protects unsaved menu/layout edits from late background refresh responses. The navigation panel exposes `data-hydrated`, `data-dirty`, and `data-draft-disabled` hooks plus a background-refresh notice, keeps menu/layout controls visible after hydration, and only shows the loading placeholder during the first navigation load. Site detail and Sites source guards fail if navigation controls regress to broad `navigationState.loading || !canConfigureSite` hiding, and the rendered Site Detail smoke verifies hydrated enabled draft controls before exercising route/footer/nested menu edits and contract persistence. `BACKY_SITE_DETAIL_SOURCE_ONLY=1 npm run test:site-detail --workspace @backy-cms/admin`, `BACKY_SITES_SOURCE_ONLY=1 npm run test:sites --workspace @backy-cms/admin`, `npm run typecheck --workspace @backy-cms/admin`, and `BACKY_SITE_DETAIL_CDP_PORT=9513 BACKY_ADMIN_BASE_URL=http://127.0.0.1:5173 BACKY_PUBLIC_API_BASE_URL=http://127.0.0.1:3001 npm run test:site-detail --workspace @backy-cms/admin` passed on 2026-05-25.
- **Site webhooks hydration/reachability update**: `/sites/$siteId` now retries webhooks hydration after admin/session permission state becomes available, tracks `hydrated` and `dirty` webhook drafts, and preserves unsaved endpoint edits if a late background refresh returns while the operator is editing. The webhooks panel exposes `data-hydrated`, `data-dirty`, and `data-draft-disabled` hooks plus a background-refresh notice, keeps Add endpoint/save/delivery controls reachable after hydration, and only shows the webhooks loading placeholder during the first load. Site detail and Sites source guards fail if webhook controls regress to the old `webhookState.loading || webhookState.saving || !canConfigureSite` hard lock, and the rendered Site Detail smoke verifies hydrated enabled controls before adding and saving an endpoint. `BACKY_SITE_DETAIL_SOURCE_ONLY=1 npm run test:site-detail --workspace @backy-cms/admin`, `BACKY_SITES_SOURCE_ONLY=1 npm run test:sites --workspace @backy-cms/admin`, `npm run typecheck --workspace @backy-cms/admin`, and `BACKY_SITE_DETAIL_CDP_PORT=9514 BACKY_ADMIN_BASE_URL=http://127.0.0.1:5173 BACKY_PUBLIC_API_BASE_URL=http://127.0.0.1:3001 npm run test:site-detail --workspace @backy-cms/admin` passed on 2026-05-25.
- **Site redirects hydration/reachability update**: `/sites/$siteId` now retries redirect-rule hydration after admin/session permission state becomes available, tracks `hydrated` and `dirty` redirect drafts, preserves unsaved redirect edits during late background refreshes, and invalidates stale preview responses when rules change while a preview is running. The redirects panel exposes `data-hydrated`, `data-dirty`, and `data-draft-disabled` hooks plus a background-refresh notice, keeps Add rule and rule-field controls reachable after hydration, and only shows the loading placeholder during the first redirect load. Site detail and Sites source guards fail if redirects regress to the old loading/previewing blanket edit lock, and the rendered Site Detail smoke verifies hydrated enabled controls before adding, previewing, and saving a redirect rule. `BACKY_SITE_DETAIL_SOURCE_ONLY=1 npm run test:site-detail --workspace @backy-cms/admin`, `BACKY_SITES_SOURCE_ONLY=1 npm run test:sites --workspace @backy-cms/admin`, `npm run typecheck --workspace @backy-cms/admin`, and `BACKY_SITE_DETAIL_CDP_PORT=9515 BACKY_ADMIN_BASE_URL=http://127.0.0.1:5173 BACKY_PUBLIC_API_BASE_URL=http://127.0.0.1:3001 npm run test:site-detail --workspace @backy-cms/admin` passed on 2026-05-25.
- **Site SEO hydration/reachability update**: `/sites/$siteId` now retries SEO hydration after admin/session permission state becomes available, tracks `hydrated` and `dirty` SEO drafts, and preserves unsaved default/JSON-LD/route-override edits if a late background refresh returns while the operator is editing. The SEO panel exposes `data-hydrated`, `data-dirty`, and `data-draft-disabled` hooks plus a background-refresh notice, keeps Save SEO and route override controls reachable after hydration, and updates dynamic SEO previews without replacing dirty local edits. Site detail and Sites source guards fail if SEO regresses to the old `seoState.loading || seoState.saving || !canConfigureSite` hard lock, and the rendered Site Detail smoke verifies hydrated enabled controls before adding a route override and saving SEO discovery defaults. `BACKY_SITE_DETAIL_SOURCE_ONLY=1 npm run test:site-detail --workspace @backy-cms/admin`, `BACKY_SITES_SOURCE_ONLY=1 npm run test:sites --workspace @backy-cms/admin`, `npm run typecheck --workspace @backy-cms/admin`, and `BACKY_SITE_DETAIL_CDP_PORT=9516 BACKY_ADMIN_BASE_URL=http://127.0.0.1:5173 BACKY_PUBLIC_API_BASE_URL=http://127.0.0.1:3001 npm run test:site-detail --workspace @backy-cms/admin` passed on 2026-05-25.
- **Site comment-policy hydration/reachability update**: `/sites/$siteId` now retries site comment-policy hydration after admin/session state becomes available, tracks `commentPolicyHydrated`, preserves unsaved comment-policy drafts if a late background refresh returns while the operator is editing, and keeps the saved-policy reference current without clobbering local changes. The comment-policy panel exposes `data-hydrated`, `data-dirty`, and `data-draft-disabled` hooks plus a background-refresh notice, keeps moderation/sort/closed-message/blocked-terms controls reachable after hydration, and only shows the loading placeholder during the first policy load. Site detail and Sites source guards fail if comment-policy controls regress to the old `commentPolicyLoading || commentPolicySaving || !canConfigureComments` hard lock, and the rendered Site Detail smoke verifies hydrated enabled controls before saving comment-policy changes. `BACKY_SITE_DETAIL_SOURCE_ONLY=1 npm run test:site-detail --workspace @backy-cms/admin`, `BACKY_SITES_SOURCE_ONLY=1 npm run test:sites --workspace @backy-cms/admin`, `npm run typecheck --workspace @backy-cms/admin`, and `BACKY_SITE_DETAIL_CDP_PORT=9517 BACKY_ADMIN_BASE_URL=http://127.0.0.1:5173 BACKY_PUBLIC_API_BASE_URL=http://127.0.0.1:3001 npm run test:site-detail --workspace @backy-cms/admin` passed on 2026-05-25.
- **Site form-builder hydration/reachability update**: `/sites/$siteId` now retries workflow/form hydration after admin/session permission state becomes available, tracks hydrated workflow state, and separates initial form-workflow loading from later background refreshes so the embedded site form builder does not feel dead after the first successful load. The form-builder panel exposes `data-hydrated`, `data-dirty`, and `data-draft-disabled` hooks plus a background-refresh notice, keeps New form/reset/save and field controls reachable after hydration, and preserves unsaved form-definition edits if a late workflow refresh returns while the operator is editing. Site detail and Sites source guards fail if form-builder controls regress to the old `state.workflowLoading || !canViewForms` hard lock, and the rendered Site Detail smoke verifies hydrated enabled form-builder controls before creating, editing, and saving a standalone site form. `BACKY_SITE_DETAIL_SOURCE_ONLY=1 npm run test:site-detail --workspace @backy-cms/admin`, `BACKY_SITES_SOURCE_ONLY=1 npm run test:sites --workspace @backy-cms/admin`, `npm run typecheck --workspace @backy-cms/admin`, and `BACKY_SITE_DETAIL_CDP_PORT=9518 BACKY_ADMIN_BASE_URL=http://127.0.0.1:5173 BACKY_PUBLIC_API_BASE_URL=http://127.0.0.1:3001 npm run test:site-detail --workspace @backy-cms/admin` passed on 2026-05-25.
- **Site comments moderation hydration/reachability update**: `/sites/$siteId` now tracks comment-list hydration separately from comment refreshes, ignores stale comment refresh responses, and keeps loaded comments plus moderation filters visible while a later filter/search refresh is running. The comments moderation panel exposes `data-hydrated`, `data-loading`, and `data-view-disabled` hooks plus a background-refresh notice, only shows the loading placeholder during the first comments load, and keeps status/target/request/search filters usable after hydration instead of disabling them on every `commentsLoading` transition. Site detail and Sites source guards fail if comments moderation regresses to the old `state.commentsLoading || !canViewComments` hard lock, and the rendered Site Detail smoke verifies hydrated enabled comments filters before completing the full site-detail workflow. `BACKY_SITE_DETAIL_SOURCE_ONLY=1 npm run test:site-detail --workspace @backy-cms/admin`, `BACKY_SITES_SOURCE_ONLY=1 npm run test:sites --workspace @backy-cms/admin`, `npm run typecheck --workspace @backy-cms/admin`, and `BACKY_SITE_DETAIL_CDP_PORT=9519 BACKY_ADMIN_BASE_URL=http://127.0.0.1:5173 BACKY_PUBLIC_API_BASE_URL=http://127.0.0.1:3001 npm run test:site-detail --workspace @backy-cms/admin` passed on 2026-05-25.
- **Site audit hydration/reachability update**: `/sites/$siteId` now tracks site-activity hydration, ignores stale audit refresh responses, and keeps existing audit rows visible during later activity refreshes instead of replacing the panel with a loading-only state. The audit panel exposes `data-hydrated`, `data-loading`, and `data-initial-loading` hooks plus a background-refresh notice, only shows "Loading site audit activity..." during the first audit load, and keeps the activity table/empty state stable while refresh requests settle. Site detail and Sites source guards fail if the panel regresses to the old `auditState.loading ?` hard placeholder, and the rendered Site Detail smoke waits for a hydrated audit panel before refreshing activity and asserting navigation/webhook/form/SEO audit rows. `BACKY_SITE_DETAIL_SOURCE_ONLY=1 npm run test:site-detail --workspace @backy-cms/admin`, `BACKY_SITES_SOURCE_ONLY=1 npm run test:sites --workspace @backy-cms/admin`, `npm run typecheck --workspace @backy-cms/admin`, and `BACKY_SITE_DETAIL_CDP_PORT=9520 BACKY_ADMIN_BASE_URL=http://127.0.0.1:5173 BACKY_PUBLIC_API_BASE_URL=http://127.0.0.1:3001 npm run test:site-detail --workspace @backy-cms/admin` passed on 2026-05-25.
- **Site readiness hydration/reachability update**: `/sites/$siteId` now tracks publish-readiness hydration, ignores stale readiness responses, and preserves the last successful readiness results if a later background refresh errors. The readiness panel exposes `data-hydrated`, `data-loading`, and `data-initial-loading` hooks plus a background-refresh notice, keeps the score/check/content summary visible during refreshes after hydration, and only uses the initial-loading state before the first readiness result arrives. Site detail and Sites source guards fail if readiness stops preserving hydrated results through refresh/error states, and the rendered Site Detail smoke waits for a hydrated enabled readiness panel before continuing the full site-detail workflow. `BACKY_SITE_DETAIL_SOURCE_ONLY=1 npm run test:site-detail --workspace @backy-cms/admin`, `BACKY_SITES_SOURCE_ONLY=1 npm run test:sites --workspace @backy-cms/admin`, `npm run typecheck --workspace @backy-cms/admin`, and `BACKY_SITE_DETAIL_CDP_PORT=9521 BACKY_ADMIN_BASE_URL=http://127.0.0.1:5173 BACKY_PUBLIC_API_BASE_URL=http://127.0.0.1:3001 npm run test:site-detail --workspace @backy-cms/admin` passed on 2026-05-25.
- **Site submission/contact queue hydration update**: `/sites/$siteId` now tracks form submission and lead-share contact queue hydration independently from the broader workflow refresh, ignores stale queue responses, and resets queue hydration only when the active form/site changes. Submission and contact panels expose `data-hydrated`, `data-loading`, and `data-initial-loading` hooks plus background-refresh notices, keep existing rows/empty states visible during filter/request-id refreshes after hydration, and preserve the last visible queue data if a later refresh errors. Site detail and Sites source guards fail if the queues regress to the old `state.submissionLoading ?` / `state.contactLoading ?` table-hiding placeholders, and the rendered Site Detail smoke verifies hydrated enabled queue reload controls after creating and saving a standalone site form. `BACKY_SITE_DETAIL_SOURCE_ONLY=1 npm run test:site-detail --workspace @backy-cms/admin`, `BACKY_SITES_SOURCE_ONLY=1 npm run test:sites --workspace @backy-cms/admin`, `npm run typecheck --workspace @backy-cms/admin`, and `BACKY_SITE_DETAIL_CDP_PORT=9522 BACKY_ADMIN_BASE_URL=http://127.0.0.1:5173 BACKY_PUBLIC_API_BASE_URL=http://127.0.0.1:3001 npm run test:site-detail --workspace @backy-cms/admin` passed on 2026-05-25.
- **Site comment-policy busy-scope update**: `/sites/$siteId` now scopes `isSiteSettingsBusy` to real site mutations instead of folding comment-policy saves into the broad site-settings lock. Saving comment policy still disables only the comment-policy draft controls through `isCommentPolicyDisabled`, while unrelated command-center handoff buttons, public-site links, domain/theme/settings controls, and delete affordances no longer look dead during that focused save. Site detail and Sites source guards fail if `isSiteSettingsBusy` regresses to `isLoading || commentPolicySaving`, and a targeted headless Chrome CDP check against `site-demo` held the comment-policy PATCH pending while asserting Copy handoff/Download JSON/open links stayed enabled and the policy panel alone reported `data-draft-disabled="true"`. `BACKY_SITE_DETAIL_SOURCE_ONLY=1 npm run test:site-detail --workspace @backy-cms/admin`, `BACKY_SITES_SOURCE_ONLY=1 npm run test:sites --workspace @backy-cms/admin`, `npm run typecheck --workspace @backy-cms/admin`, `git diff --check -- 'apps/admin/src/routes/sites.$siteId.tsx' apps/admin/scripts/site-detail-smoke.mjs apps/admin/scripts/sites-smoke.mjs specs/page-completion-audit/backy-page-surface-audit.md`, and `npm run doctor:release-certification` passed on 2026-05-25. In-app Browser validation was attempted but the Browser runtime reported `iab` unavailable, so the targeted CDP rendered check was used as fallback.
- **Admin shell/sidebar viewport contract update**: authenticated admin shell rendering is now covered by the Login smoke for the slow/overlong left-pane regression. The rendered check verifies the desktop sidebar shell and sidebar remain viewport-bound, document/body do not own page scrolling, the sidebar nav and main content each own their local scroll containers, role-default navigation is usable while permission hydration is still running, active-site context is present, and the sidebar filter plus clear button work before the session reload/navigation check. `BACKY_LOGIN_SOURCE_ONLY=1 npm run test:login --workspace @backy-cms/admin` and `BACKY_ADMIN_BASE_URL=http://127.0.0.1:5173 BACKY_PUBLIC_API_BASE_URL=http://127.0.0.1:3001 BACKY_LOGIN_CDP_PORT=9526 npm run test:login --workspace @backy-cms/admin` passed on 2026-05-25. The in-app Browser connector was not exposed by tool discovery in this session, so the repo CDP smoke was used as the rendered fallback.
- **Admin sidebar filter-empty recovery update**: the authenticated admin sidebar no longer leaves global navigation search misses as passive empty copy. The sidebar no-match state now records `data-empty-filter`, names the active query, and exposes `admin-sidebar-filter-empty-clear` so operators can return to the full navigation from the empty state itself, not only from the input's icon button. The Login source guard fails if those hooks disappear, and the rendered Login smoke verifies `settings` narrows navigation to one row, the input clear restores all 15 items, `zz-no-nav` renders the empty state with `Clear filter`, and clicking that empty-state reset clears the input, removes the empty state, and restores all navigation rows while the sidebar remains viewport-bound and session reload/navigation survival still passes. `BACKY_LOGIN_SOURCE_ONLY=1 npm run test:login --workspace @backy-cms/admin`, `node --check apps/admin/scripts/login-smoke.mjs`, `npm run typecheck --workspace @backy-cms/admin`, and `BACKY_ADMIN_BASE_URL=http://127.0.0.1:5173 BACKY_PUBLIC_API_BASE_URL=http://127.0.0.1:3001 BACKY_LOGIN_CDP_PORT=9559 npm run test:login --workspace @backy-cms/admin` passed on 2026-05-26. In-app Browser validation was attempted but the Browser runtime reported `iab` unavailable, so the repo CDP smoke was used as the rendered fallback.
- **Admin header search empty-state recovery update**: the authenticated admin header global search no longer leaves no-match queries as passive empty copy. The search input and clear affordances now expose stable hooks, the empty state records `data-empty-query`, names the active query, and provides `header-global-search-empty-clear` so operators can return to suggested tools/content without closing the search panel. The Login source guard fails if those hooks disappear, and the rendered Login smoke verifies lazy search hydration, a `Pages` filtered result, `zz-no-result` empty-state copy, and empty-state clear restoring the ready suggested-result state while the sidebar/session checks still run in the same authenticated shell. `BACKY_LOGIN_SOURCE_ONLY=1 npm run test:login --workspace @backy-cms/admin`, `node --check apps/admin/scripts/login-smoke.mjs`, `npm run typecheck --workspace @backy-cms/admin`, and `BACKY_ADMIN_BASE_URL=http://127.0.0.1:5173 BACKY_PUBLIC_API_BASE_URL=http://127.0.0.1:3001 BACKY_LOGIN_CDP_PORT=9560 npm run test:login --workspace @backy-cms/admin` passed on 2026-05-26. In-app Browser validation was attempted but the Browser runtime reported `Browser is not available: iab`, so the repo CDP smoke was used as the rendered fallback.
- **Admin header notification-center recovery update**: the authenticated admin notification center no longer leaves its empty and error bodies as passive copy. The bell toggle now exposes dialog state, the panel records `data-notification-state`, notification count, and active site id, workflow shortcuts expose stable count hooks, and both error and empty states include in-panel Retry/Refresh plus notification Settings actions while preserving the header Refresh and summary target. The Login source guard fails if those hooks disappear, and the rendered Login smoke opens the notification center, waits for lazy hydration to settle to `empty` or `ready`, verifies shortcut/refresh/summary actions, and exercises the in-panel empty refresh path when the site has no active notification rows. `BACKY_LOGIN_SOURCE_ONLY=1 npm run test:login --workspace @backy-cms/admin`, `node --check apps/admin/scripts/login-smoke.mjs`, `npm run typecheck --workspace @backy-cms/admin`, and `BACKY_ADMIN_BASE_URL=http://127.0.0.1:5173 BACKY_PUBLIC_API_BASE_URL=http://127.0.0.1:3001 BACKY_LOGIN_CDP_PORT=9561 npm run test:login --workspace @backy-cms/admin` passed on 2026-05-26. - **Contacts action-strip status semantics update**: the `/contacts` selected-contact action strip now exposes a named `Actions for {contact}` group, a hidden status summary, stable hooks for Contacted/Qualified/New/Archive lifecycle actions, promotion actions, and Delete, plus per-button `data-action-state`/`data-disabled-reason` metadata. This makes CRM actions understandable when a contact is already archived, not qualified for promotion, or temporarily busy instead of relying on disabled styling or browser title text. The Contacts source guard fails if the action status contract drifts, and the rendered Contacts smoke verifies a real contact reports "Contacted available. Qualified available. Archive unavailable: This contact is already archived. - **Provider certification artifact freshness/result-evidence update**: Settings and Commerce provider certification CI now emit a non-secret `certifiedAt` timestamp in their JSON artifacts, Settings artifacts record requested provider groups, and Commerce artifacts record the selected site plus certified requested groups that passed readiness. The release certification doctor verifies `certifiedAtReady`, `artifactFreshReady`, artifact age, max-age, future-skew, Settings infrastructure/result evidence, Commerce runtime evidence, Commerce artifact selected-site target proof, and Commerce requested-group readiness before accepting Settings, Settings admin API, Products, or Orders provider certification evidence. The default freshness window is 168 hours and can be tightened with `BACKY_PROVIDER_CERTIFICATION_ARTIFACT_MAX_AGE_HOURS`; the doctor rejects expired artifacts and artifacts that omit requested Settings result evidence, Commerce readiness evidence, or top-level Commerce `target.siteId`/`target.siteSelectorEnv` proof while preserving API-handoff diagnostics so operators can distinguish stale/missing provider evidence from broken handoff schemas. This does not change the 4 Partial count by itself because live provider credentials/runs are still required, but it makes the remaining Partial gates harder to satisfy with replayed, old, thin, or wrong-site artifacts. `node --check scripts/settings-provider-certification-ci.mjs scripts/commerce-provider-certification-ci.mjs scripts/backy-release-certification-doctor.mjs scripts/backy-release-certification-doctor-contract-smoke.mjs scripts/settings-provider-certification-preflight-contract-smoke.mjs scripts/commerce-provider-certification-preflight-contract-smoke.mjs scripts/backy-release-certification-preflight-contract-smoke.mjs`, `npm run test:settings-provider-certification-preflight-contract`, `npm run test:commerce-provider-certification-preflight-contract`, `npm run test:release-certification-doctor-contract`, `npm run test:release-certification-preflight-contract`, and `npm run doctor:release-certification` passed on 2026-05-26.

- **Release doctor partial-closure readiness update**: the release certification doctor now emits a `backy.partial-closure-readiness.v1` block that maps the four remaining Partial audit rows to their required provider evidence: `/settings` and Settings admin APIs require the Settings certification artifact, while `/products` and `/orders` require the Commerce certification artifact. Normal diagnostic mode can still return `ok: true` when no live-provider run is requested, but the readiness block reports `0 ready / 4 partial` until fresh accepted artifacts are supplied; strict artifact-required mode fails with the same rows marked Partial, and valid artifacts mark all four rows Ready. This keeps the current audit at **41 Ready / 4 Partial / 0 Prototype / 0 Missing** while making the exact closure blocker machine-readable. `node --check scripts/backy-release-certification-doctor.mjs scripts/backy-release-certification-doctor-contract-smoke.mjs`, `npm run test:release-certification-doctor-contract`, `npm run test:partial-gate-preflights`, `npm run doctor:release-certification`, and `BACKY_RELEASE_CERTIFICATION_DOCTOR_REQUIRED=1 BACKY_PROVIDER_CERTIFICATION_ARTIFACTS_REQUIRED=1 npm run doctor:release-certification` returned the expected missing-artifact failure on 2026-05-26.
- **Release doctor self-contained partial-row update**: `backy.partial-closure-readiness.v1` rows now carry their gate command, preflight, source-only guard, aggregate/admin guard, workflow, required input family, mock-provider gate when applicable, artifact required env, artifact schema version, live-provider evidence mode, and a concrete next action directly on each row. Operators and custom admin clients no longer need to join `partialClosureReadiness.rows[]` with `partialGateMap[]` before deciding whether to run `ci:settings-provider-certification`, `ci:commerce-provider-certification`, or the redacted artifact verifier. `node --check scripts/backy-release-certification-doctor.mjs scripts/backy-release-certification-doctor-contract-smoke.mjs`, `npm run test:release-certification-doctor-contract`, and `npm run doctor:release-certification` passed on 2026-05-27. This improves release evidence handoff for the remaining four Partial rows without marking them Ready before live provider artifacts exist.
- **Template registry version-ready capture update**: Backy-generated site default templates and captured content templates now carry active status plus version/createdAt/updatedAt metadata when they enter the persisted frontend-design contract, so new page/blog/form/product/collection/section clones are version-aware by default. The admin frontend-design smoke now saves versioned custom-frontend templates, verifies each template's `backy.template-version.v1` readiness through the template registry, and confirms exact filtered template lookups return a ready action plan while the full registry can still warn about older imported templates. This keeps custom frontend design metadata persistence aligned with the Wix/Webflow-style clone workflow without changing the four external live-provider Partial rows. `node --check apps/admin/scripts/frontend-design-smoke.mjs`, `npm run test:template-registry --workspace @backy/public`, `npm run test:frontend-contract --workspace @backy/public`, `npm run typecheck --workspace @backy/public`, `npm run typecheck --workspace @backy-cms/admin`, and `BACKY_PUBLIC_API_BASE_URL=http://127.0.0.1:3001 npm run test:frontend-design --workspace @backy-cms/admin` passed on 2026-05-27.
- **Rich-text toolbar action status and icon consistency update**: the editor rich-text formatting panel now exposes `rich-text-formatting-toolbar` as a real toolbar with `rich-text-toolbar-action-status`, group labels for Style/Align/Lists/Insert, and `data-action-state`/`data-action-status` metadata on the core style, alignment, list, insert, table, font-size, and caption controls. Insert image/link now have stable hooks, the emoji insert control uses the existing Lucide icon system instead of a raw glyph, and the rendered rich-text smoke verifies the live toolbar/action metadata while preserving selected-text formatting, table editing, and manual save coverage. `node --check apps/admin/scripts/editor-drag-smoke.mjs`, `BACKY_EDITOR_SOURCE_ONLY=1 npm run test:editor-drag --workspace @backy-cms/admin`, `npm run typecheck --workspace @backy-cms/admin`, and `BACKY_EDITOR_RICH_TEXT_SMOKE=1 BACKY_CDP_PORT=9738 BACKY_ADMIN_BASE_URL=http://127.0.0.1:5173 BACKY_PUBLIC_API_BASE_URL=http://127.0.0.1:3001 npm run test:editor-rich-text --workspace @backy-cms/admin` passed on 2026-05-27. This improves the Canva/Wix editor usability backlog without changing the four external live-provider Partial rows.
- **Rich-text emoji picker action status update**: the editor emoji insert flow now opens a labeled dialog with a visible header, explicit close/Escape control, shared `editor-emoji-picker-action-status` live metadata, stable quick-option/library hooks, and per-option action statuses instead of relying on outside-click dismissal or third-party picker internals alone. The editor source guard and rendered rich-text smoke verify the dialog label, close shortcut, quick-option count, first quick-option action status, and full-library status before continuing through selected-text formatting and save coverage. `node --check apps/admin/scripts/editor-drag-smoke.mjs`, `BACKY_EDITOR_SOURCE_ONLY=1 npm run test:editor-drag --workspace @backy-cms/admin`, `npm run typecheck --workspace @backy-cms/admin`, and `BACKY_EDITOR_RICH_TEXT_SMOKE=1 BACKY_CDP_PORT=9739 BACKY_ADMIN_BASE_URL=http://127.0.0.1:5173 BACKY_PUBLIC_API_BASE_URL=http://127.0.0.1:3001 npm run test:editor-rich-text --workspace @backy-cms/admin` passed on 2026-05-27. This improves the Canva/Wix editor usability backlog without changing the four external live-provider Partial rows.
- **Rich-text URL insert dialog action status update**: the editor rich-text fallback Link/Image URL dialogs now expose labeled modal semantics, shared `rich-text-insert-dialog-action-status` live metadata, stable input/confirm/cancel/close hooks, blocked empty-URL states, inline validation errors, and per-mode action statuses instead of anonymous form controls. The rich-text source guard and rendered smoke now open the link dialog, verify initial blocked metadata, submit the blank form to prove inline URL validation, cancel it, open the image dialog, verify image-mode metadata, close it, and then continue through selected-text formatting, table editing, and manual save coverage. `node --check apps/admin/scripts/editor-drag-smoke.mjs`, `BACKY_EDITOR_SOURCE_ONLY=1 npm run test:editor-drag --workspace @backy-cms/admin`, `npm run typecheck --workspace @backy-cms/admin`, `npm run test:editor-smoke-coverage --workspace @backy-cms/admin`, and `BACKY_EDITOR_RICH_TEXT_SMOKE=1 BACKY_CDP_PORT=9742 BACKY_ADMIN_BASE_URL=http://127.0.0.1:5173 BACKY_PUBLIC_API_BASE_URL=http://127.0.0.1:3001 npm run test:editor-rich-text --workspace @backy-cms/admin` passed on 2026-05-27. This improves the Canva/Wix editor usability backlog without changing the four external live-provider Partial rows.
- **Page settings modal action status update**: the editor Page Settings dialog now exposes a shared `page-settings-action-status` live contract, tablist/tabpanel semantics, active-tab metadata, close/cancel/save action states, scheduled-publish validation status, and social-share image select/remove action metadata with media-picker return focus. The page-settings source guard and rendered smoke verify the initial ready state, blocked scheduled-date state, tab metadata, dismiss controls, social image controls, successful save, and persisted title/slug/SEO/social metadata. `node --check apps/admin/scripts/editor-drag-smoke.mjs`, `BACKY_EDITOR_SOURCE_ONLY=1 npm run test:editor-drag --workspace @backy-cms/admin`, `npm run typecheck --workspace @backy-cms/admin`, `npm run test:editor-smoke-coverage --workspace @backy-cms/admin`, and `BACKY_EDITOR_PAGE_SETTINGS_SMOKE=1 BACKY_CDP_PORT=9740 BACKY_ADMIN_BASE_URL=http://127.0.0.1:5173 BACKY_PUBLIC_API_BASE_URL=http://127.0.0.1:3001 npm run test:editor-page-settings --workspace @backy-cms/admin` passed on 2026-05-27. - **Button/link behavior action status update**: the editor property inspector Button and Link behavior panels now expose named `editor-button-behavior-actions` / `editor-link-behavior-actions` groups with shared live statuses, ready/blocked metadata, and per-control `data-action-status` for action preset, action value, open target, rel, accessibility label, title tooltip, button type, and the link download toggle. The behavior panel is decomposed into `LinkBehaviorProperties.tsx`, with media-picker action policy shared through `editorMediaPickerActions.ts`, so the already-large property inspector does not absorb more control-specific logic. The component smokes now verify both the Button email-action path and the Link target/download-toggle path in the rendered editor before saving and reloading persisted props. `node --check apps/admin/scripts/editor-drag-smoke.mjs`, `BACKY_EDITOR_SOURCE_ONLY=1 npm run test:editor-drag --workspace @backy-cms/admin`, `npm run typecheck --workspace @backy-cms/admin`, `npm run test:editor-smoke-coverage --workspace @backy-cms/admin`, `BACKY_EDITOR_COMPONENT_SMOKE=button BACKY_CDP_PORT=9745 BACKY_ADMIN_BASE_URL=http://127.0.0.1:5173 BACKY_PUBLIC_API_BASE_URL=http://127.0.0.1:3001 npm run test:editor-drag --workspace @backy-cms/admin`, and `BACKY_EDITOR_COMPONENT_SMOKE=link BACKY_CDP_PORT=9746 BACKY_ADMIN_BASE_URL=http://127.0.0.1:5173 BACKY_PUBLIC_API_BASE_URL=http://127.0.0.1:3001 npm run test:editor-drag --workspace @backy-cms/admin` passed on 2026-05-27. This improves the Canva/Wix editor usability backlog without changing the four external live-provider Partial rows.
- **Editor data-binding action status update**: the editor Data inspector now exposes shared live action statuses plus ready/selected/blocked/busy metadata for preset binding slots, dataset action-plan rows, saved binding presets, dataset handoff copy controls, records URL copy, and clear binding. The data-binding adapter now uses the shared `editorActionStatus.ts` action-state policy instead of hard-coding button status logic, and the rendered data-binding smoke now verifies the blocked no-collection state, ready collection/query state, selected Summary preset state, saved preset apply/delete readiness, backend persistence, save, and reload. `node --check apps/admin/scripts/editor-drag-smoke.mjs`, `BACKY_EDITOR_SOURCE_ONLY=1 npm run test:editor-drag --workspace @backy-cms/admin`, `npm run typecheck --workspace @backy-cms/admin`, `npm run test:editor-smoke-coverage --workspace @backy-cms/admin`, and `BACKY_EDITOR_COMPONENT_SMOKE=data-binding BACKY_CDP_PORT=9747 npm run test:editor-drag --workspace @backy-cms/admin` passed on 2026-05-27. - **Editor form-builder action status update**: the live editor form field builder now exposes a shared `editor-form-builder-action-status` region plus ready metadata for Add/update field and per-field Remove controls, including target field keys, add/update mode, and current schema field count. The form adapter uses the shared `editorActionStatus.ts` policy through `editorFormBuilderActions.ts`, and the rendered form smoke verifies the add action before adding `company`, the remove action after insertion, schema preview, collection-write controls, save, persistence, and reload. `node --check apps/admin/scripts/editor-drag-smoke.mjs`, `BACKY_EDITOR_SOURCE_ONLY=1 npm run test:editor-drag --workspace @backy-cms/admin`, `npm run typecheck --workspace @backy-cms/admin`, `npm run test:editor-smoke-coverage --workspace @backy-cms/admin`, and `BACKY_EDITOR_COMPONENT_SMOKE=form BACKY_CDP_PORT=9748 npm run test:editor-drag --workspace @backy-cms/admin` passed on 2026-05-27. - **Editor animation builder action status update**: the live animation inspector now exposes `editor-animation-builder` plus a shared `editor-animation-action-status` region, ready/selected/busy/blocked metadata for animation type, trigger, direction, duration, delay, easing, scroll trigger, scrub, preview, and custom from/to JSON controls. The builder uses the shared `editorActionStatus.ts` policy and the rendered animation smoke verifies the action metadata while preserving slide-in scroll animation authoring, preview playback, save, persistence, and reload. `node --check apps/admin/scripts/editor-drag-smoke.mjs`, `BACKY_EDITOR_SOURCE_ONLY=1 npm run test:editor-drag --workspace @backy-cms/admin`, `npm run typecheck --workspace @backy-cms/admin`, `npm run test:editor-smoke-coverage --workspace @backy-cms/admin`, and `BACKY_EDITOR_ANIMATION_SMOKE=1 BACKY_CDP_PORT=9749 npm run test:editor-drag --workspace @backy-cms/admin` passed on 2026-05-27. This improves motion-authoring clarity without changing the four external live-provider Partial rows.

## Current conclusion

Backy now has most primary admin/editor/API surfaces in the Ready column, with the current table audit at **41 Ready / 4 Partial / 0 Prototype / 0 Missing**. Public manifest `data.contract.completionStatus`, OpenAPI `x-backy-completion-status`, and admin Settings `data.settings.completionStatus` expose that same count plus the remaining certification gates, artifact verifier metadata, and `partialClosureReadiness` so custom admin clients can distinguish default no-artifact status from artifact-backed release closure. The next milestone is to keep closing one Partial surface at a time, prioritizing live Settings/Commerce provider execution paths, release evidence, full RBAC/workspace scoping, and generated frontend contract regression before adding unrelated visual controls.
